title: EEG manifestations of nondual experiences in meditators.

assets.abstract: The holistic experiential benefits of meditation among a widely ranging population have been well established within the empirical literature. What remain less clear are the underlying mechanisms of the meditative process. A large impediment to this clarity is attributable to the lack of a unified and comprehensive taxonomy, as well as to the absence of clear differentiation within the literature between method of practice and resulting state. The present study discusses and then attempts to ide

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
